title: dynamic_cast should be preferred for downcasting
description: Using static_cast for downcasting from base class pointers to derived class pointers is unsafe because it performs no runtime type checking. If the object being cast is not actually of the target derived type, undefined behavior occurs. dynamic_cast provides runtime type safety for polymorphic types by returning nullptr for invalid casts.
recommendation: Replace with the recommended alternative approach.

checks.message: Consider using dynamic_cast instead of static_cast for safe downcasting. static_cast does not perform runtime type checking and can lead to undefined behavior.
